title: RepoMesh Verifier Policy
description: The verifier-plugin contract policy (#7). Defines the check-kinds registry (mode + trusted-set + weights + category), the node-kinds permission map (which node kind may sign which event type), the trusted-attestor / trusted-policy allowlists, and conflict/quorum policies. Backward-compatible: a v1 policy (no nodeKinds / scoreableResults / per-check category+weights) validates here unchanged, and so does the shipped v2 policy. REGISTERED ≠ TRUSTED — a check appearing in `checks` is registered but earns nothing without a trusted-set consensus pass.

v.description: Policy schema version. v1 = pre-#7 (trustedAttestors/checks only). v2 adds nodeKinds, scoreableResults, and per-check category/weights/attestorGated. Resolvers fall back per-field to the v1 hardcoded defaults when a v2 field is absent.

trustedAttestors.description: Nodes whose AttestationPublished events may earn trust credit (D2 allowlist).

trustedPolicy.description: Nodes whose PolicyViolation / key-lifecycle governance events are authorized (the governance floor, §4.3). Absent → falls back to trustedAttestors.

nodeKinds.description: Node-kind → permission map: which node KINDS may sign which event types. Data-driven (v2). ABSENT → resolver falls back to the v1 map {attestor,registry}→AttestationPublished, {policy,registry}→PolicyViolation. PRESENT-but-empty for an event type is an INTENTIONAL empty set (no kind may sign it), not a fallback.

canSign.description: Event types this node kind is permitted to sign (e.g. AttestationPublished, PolicyViolation).

scoreableResults.description: Attestation results that count as a COMPLETED check and may carry weight (v2). Absent/empty → v1 default [pass, warn, fail].

checks.description: The check-kinds registry. Each key is a check kind (e.g. license.audit, sbom.present). Registration earns nothing on its own — credit requires a trusted-set consensus pass.

conflictPolicies.description: Named conflict-resolution strategies referenced by checks[*].conflictPolicy.

profileOverrides.description: Per-profile (e.g. `regulated`) overrides of check conflictPolicy/quorum. Each profile maps check-kind → a partial check override.

mode.description: open = any node's attestation of this kind is considered; trusted-set = only nodes in trustedNodes.

quorum.description: Number of agreeing trusted attestations required for a consensus result.

trustedNodes.description: Nodes whose attestations of this check kind count under trusted-set mode.

conflictPolicy.description: Name of the conflict-resolution strategy (see conflictPolicies) used to fold multiple attestations into one consensus result.

category.description: v2 classification. integrity = release-integrity checks (sbom.present etc., pass-only weight); assurance = audit checks (license.audit etc., pass/warn/fail weights).

weights.description: v2 per-check scoring weights. Integrity checks declare only `pass`; assurance checks declare pass/warn/fail.

attestorGated.description: v2: when true, this (integrity) check requires a TRUSTED-attestor consensus pass — a release cannot self-grant it.
